- Configure Netlify deployment settings \(build command, publish directory, SPA routing\)
- Add all required dependencies \(React, TypeScript, Vite\)
- Fix TypeScript compilation errors
- Update index.html to load bundled application

The site now builds properly and deploys successfully to Netlify.
